item.title: SENSORY SUPPLEMENT LLC: NEURO NOURISH dietary supplement; 6-IN-1 PREBIOTIC, PROBIOTIC, VITAMIN, MINERAL, FATTY ACID, AND ANTIOXIDANT NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT TO SUPPO Recall
item.product: NEURO NOURISH dietary supplement; 6-IN-1 PREBIOTIC, PROBIOTIC, VITAMIN, MINERAL, FATTY ACID, AND ANTIOXIDANT NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT TO SUPPO
item.summary: Premature lipid oxidation causing quality issue potentially causing product to have an off odor and bitter taste. Product details: NEURO NOURISH dietary supplement; 6-IN-1 PREBIOTIC, PROBIOTIC, VITAMIN, MINERAL, FATTY ACID, AND ANTIOXIDANT NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT TO SUPPORT DRAIN AND GUT HEALTH NET WT. 5.9 OZ; UPC: 310M5951601
item.affectedPeople: Product is available nationwide and sold through the firm's online website direct to consumers.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
